description: Returns a list of Incidents for a given project.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of items returned per page (Min: 1, Max: 1000). Defaults to 1000 when parameter is not provided.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[event_date]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) with an event date within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Location IDs.

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified status value.

parameters.name: filters[contributing_behavior_id]
parameters.description: Contributing Behavior ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Contributing Behavior ID.

parameters.name: filters[contributing_condition_id]
parameters.description: Contributing Condition ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Contributing Condition ID.

parameters.name: filters[hazard_id]
parameters.description: Hazard ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Hazard ID.

parameters.name: filters[time_unknown]
parameters.description: If true, returns item(s) where the time of Incident occurrence is unknown.

parameters.name: filters[custom_status_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Custom Status IDs

parameters.name: filters[type_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with a specific Type ID or a range of Type IDs.

parameters.name: filters[assignee_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with a specific Assignee ID or a range of Assignee IDs.

parameters.name: filters[query]
parameters.description: Return item(s) containing query. Searchable fields include Incident title, Creator, Witness Statement, Incident Action description, Incident Action Type, Contributing Behavior, Contributing Conditi...

private.description: Indicates whether an Incident is private

recordable.description: Indicates whether an Incident is recordable

records_count.description: Number of Records associated to the Incident

open_observations_count.description: Number of Open Observations associated to the Incident

closed_observations_count.description: Number of Closed Observations associated to the Incident

actions_count.description: Number of Actions associated to the Incident

witness_statements_count.description: Number of Witness Statements associated to the Incident

time_unknown.description: Indicates that the time of the Incident occurrence is unknown

active.description: Represents whether a Contributing Behavior is available for use.

global.description: Represents whether a Contributing Behavior has been provided by Procore.

active.description: Represents whether a Contributing Condition is available for use.

global.description: Represents whether a Contributing Condition has been provided by Procore.

active.description: Represents whether a Hazard is available for use.

global.description: Represents whether a Hazard has been provided by Procore.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

attachments_count.description: Number of Attachments attached to the Incident
